title: Pack of 4 Soft Premium Cotton Hand Towel 100% Egyptian Cotton High Absorbent 600-GSM Extra Think Hand Towels Spa Hotel Quality 50x80cm (Charcoal Grey, 4)
features: Pack of 4 Premium Hand Towel 100% Egyptian Cotton Ultra Soft & High Absorbent – 600-GSM Extra Think Hand Towel 50x80cm. Perfect for holidays, housewarming gifts, wedding gifts, Mother’s Day gifts, engagement gifts, bridal showers, birthdays, Christmas, and homecoming, this is a great gift for everyone on your shopping list.

Our super-soft 100% Cotton towels have been specially woven with a rich cotton blend- giving you a lovely luxurious feel. Available Attractive Colors: Black, Charcoal Grey, Silver, White, Royal Blue, Navy Blue, Latte, Hot Pink, Cream, Kingfisher, Sky Blue, Wine, Purple.

Our super-soft 100% Cotton towels have been specially woven with a rich cotton blend- giving you a lovely luxurious feel. Under strict supervision, these institutional towels have been manufactured to ensure that the process of dyeing and stitching have been met by our high quality standards.

They ARE THINK FLUFFY & FLUFFY absorbent for an unbeatable feeling of touchable luxury. His towel gsm rating is 600-gsm. These towel give the body soft & delicate touch. Under strict supervision, these institutional towels have been manufactured to ensure that the process of dyeing and stitching have been met by our high quality standards.

Machine washable at 40° C, Do not Bleach, Keep Away From Fire, Wash dark colors separately do not iron. It is advised to wash these washcloths before first use which them more fluffy and soft. These washcloths are made from natural cotton and are free of harmful chemicals.
